title: Event Log JSONL y observabilidad local
reason_no_adr: El sprint implementa observabilidad local JSONL prevista en el backlog sin cambiar arquitectura, seguridad, persistencia estructural, costos, agentes ni APIs externas.
pass_criteria: Each JSONL line is parseable JSON
CLI commands emit command.started and command.completed
Synthetic secrets are redacted before persistence
EventLogger cannot write outside project root
block_criteria: EventLogger can write outside project root
Synthetic secrets remain unredacted in persisted events
known_limitations: No event rotation or retention policy yet
No formal correlation between event_id and report_id yet
Secret redaction is basic and pattern-based
No OpenTelemetry exporter or centralized observability yet
